ThingDef.label: CLSMG
ThingDef.description:
Weapon Archive: CLSMG Light Submachine Gun Designation: CLSMG Affiliation: Neo-Communist League "Iron Law" Standard Weapons Series
The CLSMG is a lightweight defensive SMG designed for non-combatants, co-developed by NCL chief engineer O'Neal and AI system "Justice". Its fully electric micro-pressure propulsion system fires high-velocity lightweight projectiles to create dense suppression zones for deterrence, disruption, and light-armor target engagement.
Structurally optimized for low recoil and user-friendly operation, the CLSMG features minimal handling barriers - enabling technicians, logistic personnel, and researchers to achieve immediate operational capability. However, as AI "Justice" assessed: this weapon "doesn't belong on battlefields" but rather in "not-yet-collapsed situations". Limited penetration, short effective range, and moderate firepower restrict its use to emergency defense and evacuation cover operations.
Regarded as "the last resort for second-line units", the CLSMG represents technological and ethical compromise under total mechanized warfare.
Design Notes: O'Neal: "You made it too soft, Justice." AI "Justice": "I calibrated it precisely - nonlethal by design."
